confusions_to_avoid: Do not confuse a chat-level hypothesis, a local smoke/preflight check, and an actual GitHub workflow file.
Do not treat docs/smart-search-13-cover-stitch-cache-plan.md as the next launch plan; it is historical.
Do not read candidates/bank.jsonl alone as the full recent candidate memory; include bank-additions-run28460740781 and earlier additions.
Do not treat local/preflight checks as evidence that a 22-link solution exists. They are technical checks only.
what_went_well: Run 28460740781 was recorded with artifacts, best candidate, mode breakdown, bank additions, and originals index.
Runs 9-13 were compared as a sequence of changing 59/64 defect walls rather than as isolated runs.
The next hypothesis was changed to rich-cover -> endpoint-feasible stitch-compress instead of another smart-search-13 rerun.
where_time_was_lost: Project state had to be reconstructed from several files; the next chat should start from START_HERE and frontier/latest.*.
frontier/latest.md and frontier/latest.json lagged behind START_HERE after the smart-search-14 package was prepared; this update synchronizes them.

conclusions_for_next_run: Numeric frontier remains 59/64; no 60/64 or 64/64 candidate was found in run 28460740781.
All 20 shard-best candidates from run 28460740781 reached 59/64.
The run produced 5 exact vertices2 representatives, 4 of them new relative to the prior recorded additions from run 28404861374.
The dominant missing set was (0,1,2),(1,2,1),(1,3,2),(2,1,3),(2,2,2), appearing in 14/20 shard-best candidates.
Do not immediately rerun smart-search-13-cover-stitch-cache with the same seed/modes.
The prepared next package is smart-search-14-rich-cover-stitch; run a short smoke-test before any full run.

current_next_step.instruction: Verify the prepared smart-search-14 files, then run a short GitHub smoke-test for smart-search-14-rich-cover-stitch. Only after a green smoke-test should a full 20-job run be considered.

comparison_with_previous_frontier.important_observation: Cache and anti-wall pressure were active and reduced collapse, but the run still stayed at the 59/64 wall.

must_verify_before_launch: workflow file path, name, inputs, generator path, checker path, and artifact names match the plan
candidate bank additions and seed run ids are aligned
local/preflight notes are not misread as proof or as evidence of a solution
